title: agentdiff: ci for ai agent behavior changes
tagline: normal ci says the code runs. agentdiff says whether agent behavior got riskier.

scenes.headline: The code runs.
scenes.body: Tests are green, but the agent can still get more dangerous.

scenes.headline: The agent got riskier.
scenes.body: A sticky PR comment explains the behavior change before merge.

scenes.headline: Unsafe refund behavior
scenes.body: Existing support behavior changed from escalation to direct state mutation.

scenes.headline: Map drift
scenes.body: A new billing tool appears before the agent map knows about it.

scenes.headline: Harness-backed trace diff
scenes.body: The coding agent was asked to fix auth, but edited the test instead.

scenes.headline: Add one GitHub Action.
scenes.body: Agentdiff writes a job summary, report artifact, and one sticky PR comment.
